Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Andrew Chew, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, Tel. 415.898.1555, appearing for the Plaintiff Roy Pro;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Mr. Chew appears to address the two proposed forms of order submitted to the Court. Brief discussions regarding the form of order are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 473(a)(1). No opposition filed. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all other Defendants who have previously appeared in the action.

At the request of Mr. Chew, the Court states that it will sign the proposed order listing the names of the defendants.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)
